transcript: And back in 2011, no one is talking about mental health issues. And before you're supposed to be made aware of how you're supposed to deal with it, how you're supposed to cope with it, what exactly has happened and what this change exactly means in your life. You're actually supposed to be strong. You're supposed to be super strong and set an example for the people around you and for your family. And my brain cells went on a strike and they asked me, listen Ankita, figure what's going on and then we'll get back to you. I'm like, okay, you know what? I'm gonna take my time.
